required_preferences.fact: Visits elderly mother in person every evening to assist with mobility and medical needs — phone check-ins only used when an in-person visit is impossible

supersedes.fact: Checks in with elderly mother every morning via phone call — never skips even when busy

required_preferences.fact: No longer participates in men's basketball league; replaces Saturday mornings with supervised aquatic therapy or gentle pool exercise

supersedes.fact: Plays in men’s basketball league every Saturday morning without fail — never misses for work

required_preferences.fact: Takes prescribed cholesterol medication with breakfast every morning — never misses a dose
Sets aside one evening per week to review and update labor dispute strategy documentation for all sites under his responsibility
Attends mandatory remote onboarding workshops for all HR managers, taking notes digitally and sharing summaries with junior staff weekly.
Shares daily transportation duties with his wife for son's ADHD after-school program, alternating days and updating the shared digital family calendar each week

persona: A mid-level HR manager at a regional manufacturing company
